metadata.name: NetBird Network Router
metadata.description: Creates a NetBird network router and targets either a single peer or a peer group.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Creates a NetBird network router inside an existing NetBird network.

## Prerequisites
- Create an admin PAT for the NetBird management API before rendering `provider.tf`.
- Provide `network_name` for the parent network. The template resolves it with `data "netbird_network"`.
- If `router_target_mode=peer`, provide `peer_name`. The template resolves it with `data "netbird_peer"`.
- If `router_target_mode=peer_groups`, provide `peer_group_names` as a comma-separated list of existing NetBird group names. The template resolves them with `data "netbird_group"`.

## Apply
- Render `provider.tf` and `main.tf`.
- Review the target mode, resolved router target, metric, and masquerade setting.
- Run `terraform fmt`, `terraform plan`, and `terraform apply`.

## References
- [NetBird Networks](https://docs.netbird.io/how-to/networks#routing-peers)
- [Terraform Resource](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/resources/network_router.md)
- [Network Data Source](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/data-sources/network.md)
- [Peer Data Source](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/data-sources/peer.md)
- [Group Data Source](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/data-sources/group.md)

variables.name: router_masquerade
variables.title: Masquerade
variables.description: Masquerade routed traffic on the selected router peer.

variables.name: router_metric
variables.title: Metric
variables.description: Router metric. Lower values have higher priority.

variables.name: router_target_mode
variables.title: Target Mode
variables.description: Route through a single peer or a peer group.

variables.name: network_name
variables.title: Network Name
variables.description: Existing NetBird network name for the parent network lookup.

variables.name: peer_name
variables.title: Peer Name
variables.description: Existing NetBird peer name for the router peer lookup.

variables.name: peer_group_names
variables.title: Peer Group Names
variables.description: Comma-separated existing NetBird group names for router groups.

variables.name: netbird_management_url
variables.title: Management URL
variables.description: NetBird Management API URL. Trailing slashes are trimmed. TLS certificates must be trusted by the OpenTofu runner because the provider does not expose a skip-verification option.

variables.name: netbird_tenant_account
variables.title: Tenant Account
variables.description: Optional tenant account ID for impersonation.
